mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL(ID, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ID, QUIZ_QUESTION_ID, QUIZ_CHOICE_ID, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL_IS_CORRECT) VALUES(#{id}, #{quizAttemptId}, #{quizQuestionId}, #{quizChoiceId}, #{quizAttemptDetailIsCorrect})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ID, QUIZ_QUESTION_ID, QUIZ_CHOICE_ID, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL_IS_CORRECT FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL WHERE QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ID = #{quizAttemptId} ORDER BY ID ASC
